findings: Identified 4 orchestrators: Muse(740L), Context(150L), Campaign Moves, Optional. No checkpointing, no timeouts, no retry logic.

Key findings: (1) Use checkpointer with thread_id for persistence, (2) Wrap side effects in @task decorator for replay safety, (3) Three durability modes: exit/async/sync, (4) Must use idempotent operations, (5) Recovery: invoke with same thread_id and None input

query: LangGraph tool calling validation JSON Schema
findings: Use Pydantic for input/output schemas, mock external APIs, validate trajectory not just output
6 patterns: Action-Selector, Plan-Then-Execute, Map-Reduce, Dual LLM, Code-Then-Execute, Context-Minimization
Use OpenInference instrumentor, trace chains/tools/tokens, span attributes for model/workspace/cost
Concrete findings for Durable Execution - checkpointing
